Date: 14 May 2019

3. Chinese Consolate General Scholarship Has Been Entitled to Get by Our Students

This year, the third Chinese Consolate General Scholarship which is annually given to the successful students by People’s Republic of China İstanbul Consolate General has been entitled to get by our three students. On 10th May 2019, Friday, Doğuş University Preparatory School students Sena Sevinç, Tuğba Köroğlu and Mehmet Hakan İmal joined the ceremony held in Shangri-La Bosphorus Hotel to receive their awards.

The award ceremony at which the announcement of the winners is made, after a lot of applicants from many Universities Supplying Education On Chinese Language applied and were evaluated according to their course grades and the use of language skills, had enjoyable moments. The opening speech of the ceremony was made by People’s Republic of China İstanbul Consul General, Chui Wei, İstanbul Lieutenant Governor, İsmail Gültekin and Doğuş University Rector, Professor Doctor Ebru Ural.

We congratulate our students who were entitled to get success scholarship and wish them continued success.
